purpose: Supply the first concrete mathematical object required by the dark-sector closed-object target packet: a closed variational action for a minimal DFM-MKC rigidity/order sector coupled to gravity.

spacetime_domain.manifold: A smooth oriented four-dimensional Lorentzian manifold M with boundary partial M allowed.

dfm_mkc_dark_sector_fields: periodic structural phase theta: M -> R / 2pi Z
visible_sector_fields: ordinary matter fields psi_vis appearing only through L_vis(psi_vis, g) in this V1 action

rho_star.role: constant vacuum-offset coefficient in the dark-sector potential

potential.definition: U(phi) = rho_star + (1/2) m_phi_squared phi^2 + (1/4) lambda_phi phi^4

lagrangian_density.definition: L_total = (R - 2 Lambda)/(16 pi G) - (alpha/2) g^{mu nu} nabla_mu phi nabla_nu phi - (beta/2) phi^2 g^{mu nu} nabla_mu theta nabla_nu theta - U(phi) + L_vis(psi_vis, g)
lagrangian_density.dark_sector_part: L_DFM_MKC = - (alpha/2) g^{mu nu} nabla_mu phi nabla_nu phi - (beta/2) phi^2 g^{mu nu} nabla_mu theta nabla_nu theta - U(phi)

action_integral.definition: S = int_M d^4x sqrt(-g) L_total + S_GHY[g]
action_integral.boundary_term: S_GHY[g] = (1/(8 pi G)) int_{partial M} d^3y sqrt(|h|) K when partial M is nonempty

variation_rules.metric_variation: Vary g^{mu nu} with fixed induced boundary metric for the Einstein-Hilbert term.
variation_rules.rigidity_amplitude_variation: Vary phi with compact support or fixed boundary value.
variation_rules.phase_variation: Vary theta as a periodic scalar with compact support or fixed boundary value.
variation_rules.visible_sector_variation: Vary psi_vis according to the chosen visible-sector Lagrangian L_vis.

boundary_terms.gravitational_boundary: Gibbons-Hawking-York term included for metric variation on manifolds with boundary.
boundary_terms.scalar_boundary: Dirichlet or compact-support variations for phi and theta.

units_and_dimensions.convention: Natural units c = hbar = 1 in four spacetime dimensions.

reduction_to_known_limits.limit: phi = 0 and rho_star absorbed into Lambda
reduction_to_known_limits.result: Einstein-Hilbert gravity with cosmological constant and visible matter.
Single real scalar rigidity-amplitude action minimally coupled to gravity.
Flat-spacetime scalar amplitude-phase field theory with quartic potential.
No propagating DFM-MKC dark-sector degrees of freedom; only a vacuum-energy shift remains.

does_not_prove: DFM-MKC ACT Planck DESI prediction vector
next_admissible_step: Derive DFM_MKC_FIELD_EQUATIONS_V1 from this action functional.
